narrative:
North Royalton City Sd city school district has 26,478 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.1% D−R vs -6.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
